servicebundles.title: Two Ways to Work With Us
servicebundles.subtitle: Choose the level of support that fits your goals — from full-service management to remote revenue optimization.
servicebundles.full.title: Full Management
servicebundles.full.desc: End-to-end property management. We handle everything — from guest check-in to maintenance.
servicebundles.digital.title: Digital Management
servicebundles.digital.desc: Remote revenue optimization. We handle pricing, listings, and guest communication — you handle the property.

transparency.title: Complete Transparency
transparency.subtitle: With our Hostaway owner portal, you maintain full control of your asset.
portfolio.title: Curated Portfolio
testimonials.label: Client Stories
testimonials.heading: Trusted by Owners
testimonials.1.text: The attention to detail Homevision provides is unmatched. My property has never looked better, and the guest reviews are consistently glowing. Truly a 'set it and forget it' experience.
testimonials.2.text: Transitioning to their digital management service was the best decision for my city apartments. The revenue calculator was spot on, and the occupancy rates have increased significantly.
testimonials.3.text: Professional, transparent, and incredibly effective. They treat my home as if it were their own. I appreciate the monthly reports and the peace of mind knowing everything is handled.
cta.title: Maximize Your Property's Earnings
cta.subtitle: Get a free revenue estimate and see how much more your property could earn under professional management.
footer.tagline: Elevating property management to an art form.
stickyfeatures.label: Features
stickyfeatures.title: Everything we offer
stickyfeatures.subtitle: Where technology meets hospitality. Explore our comprehensive digital toolkit designed for modern owners.
stickyfeatures.multiChannel.title: Multi-Channel Presence
stickyfeatures.multiChannel.desc: We optimize your listing across all major platforms—Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO—ensuring maximum visibility.
stickyfeatures.dynamicPricing.title: Dynamic Pricing
stickyfeatures.dynamicPricing.desc: Our algorithms analyze market demand, local events, and seasonality to adjust your daily rates automatically.
stickyfeatures.communication.title: 24/7 Guest Communication
stickyfeatures.communication.desc: We handle every inquiry within minutes. Late-night check-ins? Emergency questions? We are always online.
stickyfeatures.vetting.title: Guest Vetting
stickyfeatures.vetting.desc: Safety first. We screen guest profiles and reviews before accepting bookings to ensure your property remains secure.
stickyfeatures.app.title: Owner App Access
stickyfeatures.app.desc: Track earnings, view upcoming bookings, and block dates for your personal use—all from our dedicated Owner App.
stickyfeatures.sync.title: Calendar Sync
stickyfeatures.sync.desc: Never worry about double bookings. Our centralized system instantly syncs availability across all channels.
stickyfeatures.mockup.hvResponse: Absolutely! The apartment is ready for you. Taking care of it now. 🏠
qualityinspection.label: The Homevision Standard
qualityinspection.desc1: Every property undergoes our rigorous inspection protocol before each guest arrival.
qualityinspection.desc2: No detail is too small. No standard too high.
management.title: Full Management
management.subtitle: We take care of everything — from guest communication to housekeeping — so your property earns more while you do less.
digital.title: Digital Management. Anywhere in Greece.
digital.subtitle: Professional revenue management and 24/7 communication for your property.
digital.contactDesc: Contact us today for a free property assessment.
about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Elevating hospitality to an art form
about.philosophyQuote: Every property has a story. We make sure it's told right — to every guest, in every booking, through every detail.
about.rootsPara1: We started Homevision in Thessaloniki, driven by a love for the city and a desire to show travelers what makes it special. From humble beginnings, we built a team that genuinely cares.
about.rootsPara2: Our commitment to quality isn't just a tagline — it's the foundation of every decision, from pricing strategy to the way we fold towels.
about.digitalPara1: We're not just managers. We leverage cutting-edge technology — dynamic pricing, automation, real-time analytics — to maximize your results.
about.digitalPara2: With our owner portal, you have full visibility into revenue, bookings, and maintenance — anytime, from anywhere.
about.value.transparencyDesc: Full visibility into every aspect of management. Real-time access, honest reporting, no hidden fees.
about.value.excellenceDesc: Every property is treated as a luxury brand. 50-point inspections, premium photography, five-star standards.
about.value.innovationDesc: Technology that maximizes results. Dynamic pricing algorithms, automated guest communication, data-driven decisions.
about.value.peopleFirstDesc: Every guest and owner deserves personal attention. Dedicated account managers, 24/7 support, genuine care.
about.teamSubtitle: Behind every exceptional experience, there's a team that cares.
about.bio.andreas: Over a decade of experience in hospitality and real estate management across Greece.
about.bio.maria: Ensures every property operates at five-star standards. Expert in quality control and team management.
about.bio.dimitris: Drives revenue through dynamic pricing, listing optimization, and platform strategy.
about.timeline.foundedDesc: Started with a single property in Thessaloniki's historic center, driven by a passion for premium hospitality.
about.timeline.growthDesc: Rapid growth to 30+ properties. Launched the owner portal and Digital Management service for remote property owners.
about.timeline.todayDesc: 50+ properties managed, operating across Thessaloniki & the Greek Islands, with 3,000+ guest check-ins.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We're here for you. Send us a message or give us a call.
contactform.successMessage: We've received your message. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

portfoliopage.stagingDesc: We showcase your property's strongest features, creating spaces that guests want to book instantly.
portfoliopage.hotelStandardsDesc: Professional cleaning and premium linen standards ensuring impeccable hygiene and comfort.
portfoliopage.guestExperienceDesc: Welcome baskets and premium amenities that consistently earn 5-star reviews.
portfoliopage.wantToList: Want to see your property listed here?
